label: Rent Stabilization
description: Caps annual rent growth in vulnerable neighborhoods, easing displacement but dampening speculative investment.
stakeholder_reaction_on: Tenants' Coalition: 'Rent stabilisation will protect long-term residents from displacement.' Landlord lobby: 'These caps will freeze investment and accelerate building decay.'
stakeholder_reaction_off: Business Alliance: 'Lifting rent controls will restore investor confidence in the housing sector.'
